name: Head Ball Challenge
description: Head Ball Challenge puts you right into the heart of football competition. Step onto the field, show your reflexes, set your strategy, and dominate every match. Whether you challenge a friend in local multiplayer or advance through the long-term progression of Career Mode, the game delivers nonstop excitement. Two players can compete head-to-head on the same device. Challenge your friend and prove who the real champion is.
instructions: Move with W A D or Arrow Keys shoot with Space or K Mobile On-screen touch controls appear automatically Use the virtual D-pad to move and tap the action button to shoot
